ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-461850' does not contain any LC-related banking term or label. Standard verification applies.

criteria_met: Consignor 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' identified in invoice footer with full address and corporate identity number.
Consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' identified in invoice delivery address and CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO block.
pairing_validation.reasoning: Pairing validation passed: Consignor 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer. Consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' is explicitly found in the invoice delivery address and the CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO block. Document pair is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: Swedish Oat Fiber AB, Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63, BUA, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Swedish Oat Fiber AB, Address: Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63 Bua Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' anywhere in the invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The consignor name 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer: 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB, Address: Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63 Bua Sweden - Corporate Identity No: 556509-0148'. The name is an exact match after normalization. The invoice is issued by this entity (footer identifies it as the legal entity behind the invoice).
Country 'Sweden' explicitly stated in the footer address. Additionally, VAT number 'SE556509014801' has SE-prefix confirming Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Country verification via indirect identifiers (address + VAT prefix SE)

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' with address 'Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63, BUA, Sweden'. The invoice's primary billing party is 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' in Switzerland, which is a different entity. However, per rule 4.1.0 (group structure), the consignor name 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' is explicitly found in the invoice footer with the exact same name, same address (Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63 Bua Sweden), and confirmed by Corporate Identity No 556509-0148 and VAT No SE556509014801. The SE prefix in the VAT number confirms Sweden per rule 4.1.2.1. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH since the consignor name is explicitly identifiable in the invoice. The invoice header also shows 'NATUREX part of Givaudan' branding, and the footer shows 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' is the issuing entity. This confirms Swedish Oat Fiber AB issued the invoice, consistent with the certificate's consignor.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor should be matched against 'Givaudan International AG' (top-right of invoice)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Givaudan International AG (EUR) appears to be the buyer/billing party, not the invoice issuer. The invoice issuer is Swedish Oat Fiber AB as shown in the footer. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name is explicitly found in the invoice.

consignee.certificate_value: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd, Unit1-801-2,Building1,No2 Gonghua Road Huayuan Industrial Zone, Binhai High-tech Zone, 300392 Tianjin, China
consignee.invoice_value: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd, Unit1-801-2,Building1,No.2 Gonghua Road, Huayuan Industrial Zone,Binhai High - tech Zone, Tianjin 300392, CHINA

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing/consignee field in the invoice
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice has 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' in the top-right position (appears to be the Bill-To party). The 'Delivery address' block lists 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' in China. Additionally, the Remarks section explicitly states 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd'. The Bill-To party is Givaudan International AG in Switzerland. Certificate's consignee is Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.3 - Ship-To rule (certificate issued for end recipient)
comparison_steps.description: Apply Ship-To exception: certificate consignee matches invoice Ship-To/Delivery address
comparison_steps.detail: All conditions for the Ship-To rule are met: (1) Certificate's consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' is exactly identified in the invoice's Delivery address block and in the 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO' block. (2) The invoice's Bill-To party is 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' — a different party (trading/distribution intermediary). (3) Both parties appear in the same invoice — a single coherent transaction. (4) Nothing in the invoice contradicts that Tianjin Yujiu is the actual end recipient of the goods. The COO follows the goods flow to the end recipient.
Certificate states 'China'. Invoice delivery address states 'CHINA'. Match confirmed.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To rule - certificate issued for end recipient, consignee identified in Ship-To/Delivery address

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' in China. The invoice's Bill-To party (top-right) is 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' in Switzerland — a different entity. However, the invoice's Delivery address block explicitly names 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' with matching address in Tianjin, China. Furthermore, the Remarks section explicitly states 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' with the same address in China. Per rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To exception), in international trade COOs are regularly issued for the end recipient rather than the billing intermediary. All four conditions are met: (1) exact name match in Ship-To, (2) Bill-To is a different party, (3) both parties in same invoice, (4) no contradiction. Country China matches. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee should match Bill-To party 'Givaudan International AG'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.0.3, the Ship-To exception applies. The certificate is issued for the end recipient of the goods (Tianjin Yujiu), not the billing intermediary (Givaudan). The invoice explicitly identifies Tianjin Yujiu as 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO', confirming this interpretation.

goods_description.certificate_value:
300 x 18 kg paperbags
OatWell Bran BG22 OI012B22
goods_description.invoice_value: OATWELL® Bran BG22 - paper bag, OI012B22

comparison_steps.description: Verify article number OI012B22 from certificate in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate article number 'OI012B22' is found exactly in the invoice Ref. column as 'OI012B22'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Verify product name 'OatWell Bran BG22' in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'OatWell Bran BG22'. Invoice: 'OATWELL® Bran BG22 - paper bag'. The identity-bearing main designation 'OatWell Bran BG22' is identifiable in the invoice as 'OATWELL® Bran BG22' after normalization of case and the ® symbol (non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4). '- paper bag' is an additional packaging descriptor consistent with '300 x 18 kg paperbags' in the certificate. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 - Article number OI012B22 exact match
Identity-bearing main designation 'OatWell Bran BG22' identified in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions (® symbol, '- paper bag') do not affect product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: '300 x 18 kg paperbags, OatWell Bran BG22 OI012B22'. Invoice product line: 'OATWELL® Bran BG22 - paper bag, Ref. OI012B22'. Verification follows Priority 1 (article number): 'OI012B22' in certificate matches exactly with 'OI012B22' in invoice Ref. column. Additionally, the identity-bearing main designation 'OatWell Bran BG22' is identifiable in the invoice as 'OATWELL® Bran BG22' after case normalization and ignoring the ® symbol (which is a non-identity-bearing trademark indicator per rule 4.3.4). The addition '- paper bag' in the invoice is consistent with '300 x 18 kg paperbags' in the certificate — a packaging descriptor, not an identity-changing element. Both article number and product name verify successfully.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 states 'Net weight 5400 kg' — this is the verification-grounding quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains 'Net weight 5400 kg'. This is the quantity to verify. Numeric value: 5400. Unit: kg. Weight category: Net weight.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 5400 with unit kg in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice product line shows Net Weight column: '5400.0000 Kg'. Numeric value 5400.0000 truncated to integer = 5400. Unit: Kg. The column header is 'Net Weight', matching the certificate's 'Net weight' category. Exact match per rule 4.4.3 (truncation of decimals: 5400.0000 truncated to 0 decimals = 5400).

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity 'Net weight 5400 kg' is the verification-grounding quantity
Occurrence check - 5400 kg identified in invoice Net Weight column as 5400.0000 Kg
Truncation of decimals: 5400.0000 → 5400 is allowed normalization

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'Net weight 5400 kg'. Per rule 4.4.2.1, this is the verification-grounding quantity. Numeric value: 5400, unit: kg, weight category: Net weight. Invoice product line shows Net Weight: '5400.0000 Kg'. The numeric value 5400.0000 equals 5400 after truncation of trailing decimal zeros (permitted per rule 4.4.3 — truncation of decimals). The unit 'Kg' matches 'kg' after case normalization. The invoice column header 'Net Weight' matches the certificate's 'Net weight' category. No contradictory weight values exist in the invoice. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin statement in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Remarks section contains: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN'. This is an explicit origin declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin 'Sweden' with invoice origin 'SWEDEN'
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SWEDEN'. After case normalization: both are 'sweden'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN' statement in invoice Remarks

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states country of origin: 'Sweden'. Invoice Remarks section explicitly states: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN'. After case normalization, both are 'sweden'. This is a direct, explicit origin declaration in the invoice. Exact match. Additionally, the invoice states 'Total amount FCA SWEDEN' which is consistent (though not used as primary evidence since the Remarks section already provides an explicit origin statement). Single origin country — no mixed origin issues apply.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
Consignor 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' found in invoice footer. Consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' found in invoice delivery address and CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO block.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Consignor 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' found explicitly in invoice footer with full address and identifiers.
Country Sweden confirmed via footer address and VAT prefix SE.

Bill-To party is 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' in Switzerland. Certificate consignee 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' found in Delivery address and CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO block. Ship-To exception (4.2.0.3) evaluated.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Ship-To rule - certificate issued for end recipient
rule_evaluation_log.detail: All four conditions met: (1) consignee name exactly in Ship-To/Delivery, (2) Bill-To is different party Givaudan, (3) same invoice/transaction, (4) no contradiction. MATCH.
Article number OI012B22 exact match in invoice Ref. column.
'OatWell Bran BG22' identified in invoice as 'OATWELL® Bran BG22' after normalization.
® symbol and '- paper bag' are non-identity-bearing additions.
Box 7 contains 'Net weight 5400 kg' — used as verification basis.
5400 kg identified in invoice as 5400.0000 Kg in Net Weight column.
'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN' found in invoice Remarks section.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Swedish Oat Fiber AB bekräftas i fakturans sidfot med samma adress och organisationsnummer. Mottagaren Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd återfinns i fakturans leveransadress och anges uttryckligen som consignee. Varubeskrivningen OatWell Bran BG22 med artikelnummer OI012B22 och nettovikten 5 400 kg matchar exakt. Ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas av fakturans explicit angivelse 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN'. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_observations: Invoice Bill-To party is Givaudan International AG (EUR) in Switzerland — different from certificate consignee. Ship-To exception (4.2.0.3) applied successfully.
Invoice header branding shows 'NATUREX part of Givaudan' — Swedish Oat Fiber AB appears to operate under the Givaudan/Naturex brand umbrella.

Minor postal code difference in CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO block (300384) vs certificate (300392) and delivery address (300392) — noted but does not affect verification per rule 4.2.4 (address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match).

sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB' med adress Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63 BUA, Sweden identifieras exakt i fakturans sidfot: 'Swedish Oat Fiber AB, Address: Båtafjordsvägen 12, 432 63 Bua Sweden'. VAT-numret SE556509014801 bekräftar Sverige. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd, Unit1-801-2,Building1,No.2 Gonghua Road, Huayuan Industrial Zone, Binhai High - tech Zone, Tianjin 300392, CHINA (leveransadress + 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO')
sections.rule_applied: Ship-To-undantag (4.2.0.3) — certifikatet är utfärdat för slutmottagaren av varorna. Mottagarnamnet identifierades exakt i fakturans leveransadress och i det uttryckliga CONSIGNEE-blocket.
sections.motivation: Fakturans faktureringsfält anger 'Givaudan International AG (EUR)' i Schweiz. Certifikatets mottagare 'Tianjin Yujiu International Trade Co., Ltd' återfinns dock i fakturans leveransadressblock och i det uttryckliga blocket 'CONSIGNEE AS PER SHIP TO'. Ship-To-undantaget (4.2.0.3) tillämpas: certifikatet avser slutmottagaren, fakturans Bill-To är en annan part, båda parter finns i samma faktura, ingen motsägelse. Land China matchar. MATCH.

300 x 18 kg paperbags
OatWell Bran BG22 OI012B22
sections.invoice_value: OATWELL® Bran BG22 - paper bag, Ref. OI012B22
sections.rule_applied: Artikelnummermatchning (4.3.2) — OI012B22 matchar exakt. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning (4.3.3) — 'OatWell Bran BG22' identifieras i fakturan som 'OATWELL® Bran BG22'.
sections.motivation: Artikelnummer OI012B22 matchar exakt mellan certifikat och faktura. Produktbeteckningen 'OatWell Bran BG22' identifieras i fakturan som 'OATWELL® Bran BG22' efter normalisering av versaler och bortsett från ®-symbolen (icke-identitetsbärande tillägg). MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) — numeriskt värde 5400 med enhet kg identifieras i fakturans Net Weight-kolumn som 5400.0000 Kg. Decimaltrunkering tillämpad.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 'Net weight 5400 kg'. Fakturans produktrad anger Net Weight: '5400.0000 Kg'. Numeriskt värde 5400.0000 trunkerat till 5400 (tillåten normalisering). Enhet kg matchar. Viktkategori Net weight matchar. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Explicit ursprungsangivelse identifierad (4.5.1) — 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN' i fakturans anmärkningssektion. Normalisering av versaler tillämpades.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger ursprungsland 'Sweden'. Fakturans Remarks-sektion anger explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN SWEDEN'. Efter normalisering av versaler: sweden = sweden. Exakt matchning. MATCH.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet, ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Certifikatets uppgifter kan fullt ut verifieras mot den bifogade fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH → comparison_result = IDENTICAL. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW detected. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
